topic: Spain PP vs PSOE polling gap
summary: PP leads PSOE by 4.0pp (34.2% vs 30.2%) as of late October 2025. Gap has narrowed from ~6pp mentioned in question background.
content: Politico Poll of Polls Spain: PP 34.2%, PSOE 30.2%. Gap: 4.0pp. The question background mentioned PP 34% vs PSOE 28% (6pp gap), so the gap has narrowed somewhat. Still, PSOE overtaking PP by Dec 31 remains very unlikely - would need a ~4pp swing in 2 months.
